name: io.github.ariffazil/arifos-mcp
title: arifOS Sovereign Governance MCP
description: Constitutional AI governance server with 15-tool surface (10 APEX-G + 5 Phase 2), Trinity engines (ΔΩΨ), and F1-F13 floor enforcement.

init_anchor_state.description: 000 INIT - Session anchor. Bootstrap a governed session and mint continuity context.

integrate_analyze_reflect.description: 111 FRAME - Integrate, analyze, reflect. Frame the problem before deep reasoning.

reason_mind_synthesis.description: 333 REASON - Mind synthesis. Run multi-step governed reasoning for the active session.

metabolic_loop_router.description: Stage 444 ROUTER - Metabolic Loop. The all-in-one arifOS Sovereign evaluation.

vector_memory_store.description: 555 MEMORY - Vector memory store. Store, recall, search, or forget BBB memory.

assess_heart_impact.description: 666A HEART - Impact assessment. Evaluate empathy, care, and stakeholder harm.

critique_thought_audit.description: 666B CRITIQUE - Thought audit. Run adversarial critique against a prior reasoning artifact.

quantum_eureka_forge.description: 777 FORGE - Eureka proposal. Forge a sandboxed discovery or implementation proposal.

apex_judge_verdict.description: 888 JUDGE - APEX verdict. Render the sovereign constitutional judgment for a session.

seal_vault_commit.description: 999 SEAL - Vault commit. Append an immutable session verdict to VAULT999.

search_reality.description: Legacy external capability: web grounding before making claims.

ingest_evidence.description: Legacy external capability: extract evidence from a source URL.

audit_rules.description: Legacy external capability: verify current state against the Floors.

check_vital.description: Legacy external capability: system health and constitutional vitality.

metabolic_loop.description: Legacy orchestration tool preserved for compatibility only.
